//: Pyright/Pylance config for the PySide6 desktop app.
PLACE THIS INSIDE frontend_py6/ — beside app/, core/ and modules/.
It is deliberately self-relative: every path below is '.', meaning
'the directory this config file sits in'. Nothing here names a parent
folder, so the same file works from D:\Projects\Vectrix\frontend_py6,
any checkout path, in any IDE, with no edit.
This replaces the earlier repo-root config, which hardcoded
extraPaths: ['frontend_py6'] and therefore broke the moment the parent
Why it is needed at all: app/main.py executes from inside this
directory, so the app's own imports are top-level absolute --
editor rooted anywhere above here cannot resolve those without being
told this directory is a source root.
If your IDE opens the REPO ROOT rather than this folder, Pylance reads
only a config at that root. In that case either open frontend_py6 as
the workspace folder, or add a second config up there -- that one has
to name this directory, which is unavoidable when the root is above it.
